Video.summary: Michael and Larken Letchworth set out on a new adventure, exploring food fishing and the great outdoors. This father son duo are making memories that will last a lifetime and will forever be etched in the digital world.
Video.title: "The Beginning"

Video.summary: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 1"

Video.summary: In part 2 of the British episodes, Andy visits the majestic land of Scotland. Here he is introduced to Scottish deer stalking, a type of hunting that is full of history and etiquette. He hunts ‘monarch’ stags and goes into the Atlantic waters to find some of the freshest shellfish on the planet which he, and Mike Robinson cook and eat. Concluding the British episodes in a place as wild as Scotland really sets the tone for the series.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 2"

Video.summary: Randy is at the Raven in Missouri trying to take advantage of some dry weather and get some Big Tine borderline planted and check off a long list of other summer time prep work as opening day of deer season will be here before we know it.
Video.title: "Summer Time Work On The Raven"

Video.summary: Mike Pentecost sets up a new stand on a creek crossing in Illinois that had been scouted for the past two years. It always heated up as the season progressed, and on his very first morning sit, the action unfolded fast. A good buck came cruising from the South in search of a doe. At 60 yards he started to turn away, but the Intimidator grunt call changed everything. With a few calls from the Intimidator, he spun around from 150 yards, worked a scrape at 40 yards, and walked right into range!
Video.title: "Right Spot, Right Time"

Video.summary: Turkey hunting in Texas hits differently — especially when it’s your first time behind the gun. In this week’s HuntStand TURKEY POSSE episode, Will Cooper introduces longtime best friends Aubry Gold and Chance Eckert to the world of spring turkey hunting in the Lone Star State. What starts as a casual hunt quickly turns into full-blown addiction as Rio Grande gobblers fire up, decoys get worked, and the Texas cedars come alive.
Video.title: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Image.alt: "Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"
"Texas Turkey: First Toms and a New Addiction"

Video.summary: Heading to one of the great wilderness areas of North America, Dan Cabela is in search of Stone Sheep in British Columbia. Joining scientists, they embark on an ambitious conservation project to help conserve this incredible species.
Video.title: "Keeping Sheep on the Mountains"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor meet up with Captain Nick LaBadie at Big Pine Key for an action packed day on the flats chasing tarpon, bonefish and permit for the elusive grand slam.
Video.title: "Double Slam with Captain Nick LaBadie"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor run from Hawks Cay Resort up to Islamorada on a windy day to fish under the mangroves for Goliath grouper.
Video.title: "Goliaths Under the Bushes"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor join Captain Bryson Shaaber to fish the channels around Key West targeting big spring tarpon with live pinfish.
Video.title: "Tarpon in the Key West Channels"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor launch out of Key Largo and fish their way up a creek filled with monsters.
Video.title: "Creek Monsters"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by Captain Tony Young for a day of offshore fishing and free diving out of Islamorada.
Video.title: "Islamorada Offshore With Capt. Tony Young"

Video.summary: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head deep into the Everglades to target snook in the murky waters of Lake Ingraham.
Video.title: "Lake Ingraham Snook"

Video.summary: Michael and Larken travel to South Carolina's Lowcountry for a massive barbecue charity event supporting children battling serious illness. After serving up smoke for a great cause, they spend an extra day in the marsh chasing redfish and speckled trout.
Video.title: "Holy Smokes"

Video.summary: Famous for its Mayan ruins, the Yucatan in Mexico is home to a diverse array of wildlife. After years of over-harvesting and exploitation, regulated hunting is helping to conserve large areas of this fragile ecosystem. Dan Cabela travels to the region to find out more.
Video.title: "Into the Yucatán"

Video.summary: The boys are at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma getting the Oklahoma turkey season kicked off.
Video.title: "Turkey Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Shotgun sports are experiencing unprecedented growth, with competitions across the country gaining popularity as enthusiasts vie to be the best shooters in the world. Every summer, the Amateur Trapshooting Association hosts The Grand American in Sparta, Illinois. This year marks the 125th Anniversary for the largest trap shooting competition in the world. We’ll talk with the people who make this tournament run behind the scenes and explore what makes this tournament such a special event. We’ll also look at the rich history of The Grand. On-site we’ll chat with the curator of the Trapshooting Hall of Fame and look at some of the incredible historical pieces on display in the museum. Additionally, we’ll learn about White Flyer and how the clay manufacturer has made important innovations for the shotgun sports.
Video.title: "A Grand History"

Video.summary: Join Shoshone Team Members Sam Kohler & David McElwain embark on an epic mountain hunting expedition to Kodiak Island, Alaska in pursuit of the majestic Mountain Goat and famed Sitka Blacktail Deer. This hunt is an expose on the trials and tribulations of mountain hunting and the brotherhood that is forged in the untamed wilderness of Kodiak.
Video.title: "Mountain Monarch | Kodiak Island Mountain Goat Expedition"

Image.alt: "Mountain Monarch | Kodiak Island Mountain Goat Expedition"
"Mountain Monarch | Kodiak Island Mountain Goat Expedition"
"Mountain Monarch | Kodiak Island Mountain Goat Expedition"

Video.summary: The National Wild Turkey Federation stands for much more than the wild turkey – it’s also about forging lifelong relationships and enjoying the kind of fellowship you can only find in turkey camp. Josh Dahlke joins NWTF Regional Director Kevin Hurst and friends to celebrate Spring in pursuit of Missouri longbeards.
Video.title: "Missouri Turkey Camp with NWTF"

Video.summary: Willi got an invitation on a late season whitetail hunt in Oklahoma. He joins Tom Petry for a rifle hunt on a property he has no history with, but it did have some good deer and lots of wild horses.
Video.title: "Okie Horse Pasture Buck"

Video.summary: Philip Culpepper joins Spring Thunder once again to hunt South Florida Osceola's. Sometimes, they're on fire, and you've got to "run-and-gun" to make it happen. Other times, you've got to
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Gobbler Covers 200 Yards | Culpepper in South Florida | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "Big Gobbler Covers 200 Yards | Culpepper in South Florida | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Big Gobbler Covers 200 Yards | Culpepper in South Florida | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Big Gobbler Covers 200 Yards | Culpepper in South Florida | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Realtree's David Blanton talks about some of his essential turkey hunting gear. These are the items that he has found to be the handiest throughout the years.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "David Blanton's Turkey Gear Must-Haves | Turkey Gear Essentials | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: David Blanton hunts South Texas with Georgia Kate McFerrin of Legends of the Fall TV. The two hunters get after some early season (and aggressive) turkeys. It's a great Lone Star State turkey hunt.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Aggressive Gobblers Down South | Opening-Week Texas Success | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "Aggressive Gobblers Down South | Opening-Week Texas Success | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Aggressive Gobblers Down South | Opening-Week Texas Success | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Aggressive Gobblers Down South | Opening-Week Texas Success | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Phillip Culpepper is back, and he and the crew chase wild turkeys in the Sunshine State. Obviously, Spring Thunder is rolling in full force, and this week, we join the crew down south in Florida. Conditions are rough, but the guys stay after it and close the distance.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Sunshine State Redemption Gobblers | Florida Longbeard Down | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "Sunshine State Redemption Gobblers | Florida Longbeard Down | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Sunshine State Redemption Gobblers | Florida Longbeard Down | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "Sunshine State Redemption Gobblers | Florida Longbeard Down | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Capt Mike meets up with Leiza Fitzgerald and Jimmy Huddleston for a star tournament redfish tag mission.
Video.title: "Ozona Tag Team"

Video.summary: Capt Josh and Johnny from Johnny Jigs head out with gorgeous weather on their side to hit some reefs and put the jigs to work!
Video.title: "Johnny Jigs"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared Raskob joins Key West Guide Capt. Greg Dini for a wild adventure in the Florida Everglades.
Video.title: "No Motor Zone"

Video.summary: CA returns to his old stomping grounds, chasing legend in familiar waters. Giants still roam here and feed on the smallest of offerings.
Video.title: "The Hunt For Gobby Dick"

Video.summary: Capt Justin Leake and Meredith McCord divert attention from what’s not happening with the tarpon bite to using CoastMaster, light tackle and experience to find snapper success on heavily fished public spots.
Video.title: "Dog Daze Delight"

Video.summary: When the Bay Point Billfish Open returns, we hop on board the Ellie B for some offshore competition and follow the event’s epic dockside party.
Video.title: "Billfish Open Rebirth"

Video.summary: We are blessed for the opportunity to follow along the guys from Trinity Oaks for Bucks for the Brave. The men and women that served in our armed services and as first responders, had jobs that required the, to be willing to sacrifice their own lives every day, in order to protect or save someone else's. Not many of us can say that, nor understand what that truly means. The things they've had to see, and the sacrifices they've made in their daily lives, can have a profound impact on them. Trinity Oaks' Bucks for the Brave platform allows the loved ones and communities that support these heroes to share their stories and unite us all in honoring and recognizing their service to our great nation. We are proud to continue to be a part of this incredible program, getting these heroes in the outdoors for the hunt of a lifetime.
Video.title: "Trinity Oaks - Bucks for the Brave"

Video.summary: In this eye-opening episode, Dan Schmidt explores the fascinating science behind a whitetail deer's vision.
Video.title: "Through The Eyes Of A Whitetail"

Video.summary: Capt. Mike Avinon takes Blair off Naples for a variety of fish.
Video.title: s - "Flat Rocks and Fire Trucks"

Video.summary: In this week’s episode Capt. Jason Dozier and His buddy Cody Williams head out of Key West to fish for pelagic and dive for Spiny lobster.
Video.title: "Lake Atlantic"

Video.summary: The Odyssea Sportfishing family grows as Casey Villone comes aboard as Rush's new deck hand. While Rush gained a helping hand on his charters, he also scored a new "Fishing Mate" who is always game to bend a rod. With a day off and a report of Tuna offshore, the two head out to see if they can beat the sharks and land a Key West sushi dinner.
Video.title: "Fishing Mate"

Video.summary: Rush teams up with longtime friend and fellow angler Jesus Diaz for a well-earned "busman's holiday" in the beautiful waters of Key West. Even on a day off, these two can't resist seeing what's going to bite. Taking the wind and the tides into account, the duo maps out a strategic circuit through Key West's surrounding waters to target cobia, grouper, snapper, and tuna for a busy day "off" work.
Video.title: "Fishing With Zeus in Key West"

Video.summary: Water quality is everything—and the Star brite - SeaSafe team is back at it for the second year in a row! Led by Cory Redwine, Conservation Director of Project SeaSafe, this is the 4th Annual Clean Water Collective and it’s bigger than ever. This time, we’re in Grant, Florida, where 4 million clams are being released into the Indian River Lagoon, paired with the planting of thousands of mangroves, oyster work by CCA and trash clean ups to help restore one of Florida’s most critical ecosystems. But it’s not just about hard work—it’s about connection. With local captains, fishing legends, and the Local Knowledge crew on hand, we hit the water to show why this place is worth fighting for. From clam drops by drone, to in-water mangrove planting, to monster snook catches, this is hands-on conservation at its best. This two-part series kicks off with action, heart, and the kind of hope only a healthy waterway can bring. Don’t miss Part 1—where conservation meets community and everyone gets their hands wet.
Video.title: "SeaSafe Snook Part 1"

Video.summary: As part of this year's Star brite Sea Safe event, we hit the water to experience some of the incredible fishing the Indian River Lagoon has to offer. For Rush, that meant some serious bow time with close friend Alex Hughey - on the hunt for some of the biggest snook we've ever encountered. The bite wasn't easy, but that didn't stop Rush from smashing his personal best - not once, but twice - in one unforgettable day on the water. Don't miss this action-packed episode of the Sea Safe adventure from beautiful Sebastian, Florida!
Video.title: "SeaSafe Snook Part 2"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss ventures to South Florida with the hope of having a few Exotic Encounters.
Video.title: "Exotic Encounters"

Video.summary: Capt Brandon visits Quails Landing Plantation in South Georgia and his buddy Steven Redrick to do all things outdoors.
Video.title: "Quails Landing"

Video.summary: The crew makes it to Oklahoma. Unfortunately, the weather is not in their favor, but that doesn't slow them down. The morning breaks light, and the crew hears dozens of gobbles.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Image.alt: Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder - "7-Day Slam: Windy Conditions and Screaming Oklahoma Gobblers | Spring Thunder"

Video.summary: Spring Thunder's Phillip Culpepper turkey hunts Wisconsin for late-season gobblers with United Country's Travis Hamele. They have an incredible hunt, and turkeys fall from the skies.
Video.title: "An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"

Image.alt: "An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"
"An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"
"An Airborne Longbeard Double | Wisconsin Turkey Hunting"

Video.summary: The boys are still at the Dirty bird in Oklahoma, trying to get a few more tasks done before heading back to the Raven in Missouri. They also manage to get out and do a little velvet scouting with the Hawk spotting scope.
Video.title: "Hanging Tree Stands And Velvet Scouting"

Video.summary: In Missouri, we join Avery Epperson on the home farm with one goal in mind—catching up with a legendary buck known as Old Monroe. It doesn’t take long before the hunt heats up as the crew spots their target and works to grunt him into bow range. Hunting over a lush green plot on the home farm, Avery gets the chance every whitetail hunter dreams of.
Video.title: "Old Monroe"

Video.summary: Buckmasters, Honey Brake and Realtree have joined forces with Big Dream Outdoors to get Justin Webb and Brandi Deese a grand slam on video this spring. Justin completes the first leg of the slam with a 2-for-1 Osceola special. Next stop-Texas for the Rio!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Osceola Dreams"

Video.summary: Randy and Cody are wrapping things up on the Raven before bow season arrives in Missouri. Planting I-70 the plot where Randy killed one of his biggest Missouri bucks ever last year. Then Randy and Cody attempt to setup a new farm they are calling “The River Farm” they attempt to plant a food plot, bush hog, spray the plot, setup a new Titan blind, and setup a Hooyman dual perimeter fence all in one day before the sun goes down.
Video.title: "I-70 and The River Farm"

Video.summary: Each and every spring Ty makes it a point to spend some time hunting with his father and his daughter, but it's a rarity that he's able to hunt with them both at the same time. This year though, they were able to get out twice and the second time out was a hunt they won't soon forget!
Video.title: "On A String"

Video.summary: Willi and Tom Petry meet in Iowa with good friends, the Wrights to hunt turkeys on their farms. Willi and Tom drew the first season in Iowa and had the first kick at the cat for the spring. They had hunted deer with Cody and Cassie but neither had hunted turkeys in Iowa. They are hoping for a little luck with the gobblers, and they know they are going to have a good time trying.
Video.title: "Iowa Turkey, .410's and Reapers"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade ends the saga with a deer he has watched for a few years, Pope. On a previous episode you saw Slade put in all of the work with feeder and food plot strategy to make the stars align. Make sure you watch that episode as well to see the behind the scenes work it took to bring Pope to 25 yards.
Video.title: "Pope"

Video.summary: It’s that time again—when the boys from StruttinBuck load up and head out of Arkansas, bound for Fairfield, Texas and the FE Hill Ranch. Another year, another hunt, and another chapter in a tradition that’s grown into something far bigger than the hunt itself. This annual father-son trip is built on early mornings, shared stories, and moments that stick with you long after the season ends. It’s the memories made over the years that keep calling them back—and this year will be no different.
Video.title: "FE Hill"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: The Super Retriever Series Crown Championship brings together the nation’s top canine athletes and handlers in Shreveport-Bossier City, Louisiana. In Part 1 of the Amateur Division, teams face off in challenging Retriever Trials alongside high-energy SRS Super Dock competition. Precision, power, and teamwork are put to the test as the road to the Crown begins.
Video.title: Series - "Crown Championship Part 1"
